title: carex scabriculmis
intro: Carex scabriculmis, also known as the rough-leaved sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Carex scabriculmis include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its rhizomes can be dried and used in herbal remedies.
